title: Early-Anomaly Prediction in Surveillance Cameras for Security Applications
Vision-Based Pedestrian Gesture Recognition System Using Spatiotemporal Features
Image and Video-Based Crime Prediction Using Object Detection and Deep Learning
summary: This paper proposes a deep learning-based surveillance system for crime prediction through image and video analysis. The system detects potentially dangerous objects, including firearms and bladed weapons, to alert authorities before incidents occur. The authors compare YOLO, SSD, and Faster R-CNN object detection models and conclude that YOLOv5 provides the best trade-off between detection accuracy (mAP) and inference speed, making it suitable for real-time surveillance applications.
